title: Chest Wood Types
description: Turns Trapped Chests and Copper Chests into Chests of all Wood Types!
body:
# Chest Wood Types
The pack replaces the default chests (excluding the ender chest) with 6 of the default wood types, according to this list:

- Normal Chest - Oak
- Trapped Chest - Spruce
- Copper Chest - Acacia
- Exposed Copper Chest - Jungle
- Weathered Copper Chest - Birch
- Oxidized Copper Chest - Dark Oak
